description: Terms and patterns the translator must NOT translate. Strings matched by 'literal' are protected by exact (case-sensitive) match; 'patterns' are JavaScript regular expressions applied to text nodes before sending to the translation API. Extend this file as new brand terms surface during QA.

notes.literal: Exact substring match. Order matters: longer phrases first prevent partial-match breakage (e.g. 'DeliGo Ride' before 'DeliGo').
notes.patterns: URLs, emails, phone numbers, copyright lines, and template placeholders ({{var}} or ${var}). Translation API call wraps each match with a sentinel that survives translation and is restored after.
